description: Post a comment on a Bitbucket Data Center pull request or repository issue (REST POST .../comments). Optional parent_comment_id creates a reply thread.

resource.description: Whether the comment is on a pull_request or issue.

resource_id.description: Pull request id or issue id (same numeric id used in REST paths for that resource).

body.description: Comment text (Bitbucket wiki/markup as configured on the server).

parent_comment_id.description: Optional parent comment id to post a reply (pull requests and issues when supported).
